input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.4.1
            TITLE: the insulation monitoring device will be tested by connecting a resistor between the tractive

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.4.1: The Insulation Monitoring Device will be tested by connecting a resistor between the Tractive
IN.4.4.1 The Insulation Monitoring Device will be tested by connecting a resistor between the Tractive 
System Measuring Points (EV.5.8), and several electrically conductive vehicle parts while the 
Tractive System is active

final_answer: The Insulation Monitoring Device will be tested by connecting a resistor between the Tractive System Measuring Points (EV.5.8), and several electrically conductive vehicle parts while the Tractive System is active
